This notebook creates quadrant plots to compare protein abundance measurements across three analytical methods in pediatric B-cell precursor acute lymphoblastic leukemia (BCP-ALL), specifically comparing HeH (Hyperdiploid) vs ETV6::RUNX1 subtypes.

```{r}
library(readxl)
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
library(ggrepel)
library(patchwork)
library(ggtext) 

# Data path
data_path <- "../data"

# Read data
df <- read_excel(paste0(data_path, '/Enblad-et-al-SUPP-Tables-2026-01-14.xlsx'), 
                 sheet = 'Table S15 HeH vs ER-overlap', skip = 2)

# Column definitions based on actual data structure
protein_col <- '...1'
category_col <- '...4'
olink_fc_col <- 'log2FC...7'
olink_pval_col <- 'adjusted p-value...8'
rna_fc_col <- 'log2FC...11'
rna_pval_col <- 'adjusted p-value...12'
massspec_fc_col <- 'log2FC...15'
massspec_pval_col <- 'adjusted p-value...16'

# Function to create quadrant plot with correlation
create_quadrant_plot <- function(data, x_col, y_col, x_pval_col, y_pval_col, 
                                title_suffix, x_label, y_label, p_threshold = 0.05,
                                fixed_limits = NULL,
                                shape_values = NULL) {
  
  # Prepare data
  plot_data <- data %>%
    select(all_of(c(protein_col, category_col, x_col, y_col, x_pval_col, y_pval_col))) %>%
    filter(complete.cases(.)) %>%
    mutate(
      significant = (.data[[x_pval_col]] < p_threshold) & (.data[[y_pval_col]] < p_threshold),
      
      quadrant = case_when(
        .data[[x_col]] > 0 & .data[[y_col]] > 0 ~ "Concordant Upregulated",
        .data[[x_col]] < 0 & .data[[y_col]] > 0 ~ "Discordant (X↓, Y↑)", 
        .data[[x_col]] < 0 & .data[[y_col]] < 0 ~ "Concordant Downregulated",
        .data[[x_col]] > 0 & .data[[y_col]] < 0 ~ "Discordant (X↑, Y↓)"
      ),
      
      sig_category = case_when(
        significant & quadrant == "Concordant Upregulated" ~ "Significant Concordant ↑HeH",
        significant & grepl("Discordant", quadrant) ~ "Significant Discordant",
        significant & quadrant == "Concordant Downregulated" ~ "Significant Concordant ↑ETV6::RUNX1",
        !significant ~ "Non-significant (RNA or MS)"
      )
    )
  
  # Calculate correlation
  cor_test <- cor.test(plot_data[[x_col]], plot_data[[y_col]], method = "pearson")
  cor_r <- round(cor_test$estimate, 3)
  cor_p <- cor_test$p.value
  
  # Format p-value
  if (cor_p < 0.001) {
    cor_p_text <- "p < 0.001"
  } else {
    cor_p_text <- paste("p =", round(cor_p, 3))
  }
  
  # Create correlation text
  cor_text <- paste0("r = ", cor_r, "\n", cor_p_text, "\nn = ", nrow(plot_data))
  
  # Colors
  colors <- c(
    "Significant Concordant ↑HeH" = "#d73027",
    "Significant Discordant" = "#fc8d59",
    "Significant Concordant ↑ETV6::RUNX1" = "#4575b4",
    "Non-significant (RNA or MS)" = "#bababa"
  )
  
  # Shapes based on category column (...4)
  # IMPORTANT: Use a *single* global mapping so categories keep the same shape
  # across plots (otherwise ggplot assigns different shapes depending on which
  # categories are present after filtering).
  if (is.null(shape_values)) {
    categories <- unique(plot_data[[category_col]])
    categories <- categories[!is.na(categories)]
    categories <- sort(as.character(categories))
    n_categories <- length(categories)
    shapes <- c(16, 17, 15, 18, 8, 3, 4, 7, 9, 10)[1:n_categories]
    names(shapes) <- categories
  } else {
    shapes <- shape_values
  }
  
  # Determine axis limits
  if (!is.null(fixed_limits)) {
    x_lim <- fixed_limits$x
    y_lim <- fixed_limits$y
  } else {
    x_range <- range(plot_data[[x_col]], na.rm = TRUE)
    y_range <- range(plot_data[[y_col]], na.rm = TRUE)
    
    max_range <- max(abs(c(x_range, y_range)))
    x_lim <- c(-max_range, max_range)
    y_lim <- c(-max_range, max_range)
  }
  
  # Position correlation text in upper left corner
  cor_x <- x_lim[1] + 0.05 * diff(x_lim)
  cor_y <- y_lim[2] - 0.2 * diff(y_lim)
  
  # Create plot
  p <- ggplot(plot_data, aes(x = .data[[x_col]], y = .data[[y_col]])) +
    
    # Quadrant backgrounds
    annotate("rect", xmin = 0, xmax = Inf, ymin = 0, ymax = Inf, 
             fill = "#ffe6e6", alpha = 0.2) +
    annotate("rect", xmin = -Inf, xmax = 0, ymin = 0, ymax = Inf, 
             fill = "#fff2e6", alpha = 0.2) +
    annotate("rect", xmin = -Inf, xmax = 0, ymin = -Inf, ymax = 0, 
             fill = "#e6f3ff", alpha = 0.2) +
    annotate("rect", xmin = 0, xmax = Inf, ymin = -Inf, ymax = 0, 
             fill = "#f0e6ff", alpha = 0.2) +
    
    # Add correlation line (trend line)
    geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = TRUE, color = "black", linetype = "dashed", 
                alpha = 0.3, linewidth = 0.8) +
    
    # Points
    geom_point(aes(color = sig_category, shape = .data[[category_col]]), 
               size = ifelse(plot_data$significant, 3, 2),
               alpha = ifelse(plot_data$significant, 0.8, 0.4)) +
    
    # Reference lines
    geom_hline(yintercept = 0, color = "black", linewidth = 0.8, alpha = 0.7) +
    geom_vline(xintercept = 0, color = "black", linewidth = 0.8, alpha = 0.7) +
    
    # Correlation text
    annotate("text", x = cor_x, y = cor_y, label = cor_text, 
             hjust = 0, vjust = 1, size = 4, 
             fontface = "bold", color = "black") +
    
    # Labels for ALL points
    geom_text_repel(
      aes(label = .data[[protein_col]]),
      size = 2.5,
      max.overlaps = 30,
      box.padding = 0.2,
      point.padding = 0.2,
      segment.color = "gray50",
      segment.alpha = 0.4,
      min.segment.length = 0.05,
      force = 2
    ) +
    
    # Styling
    scale_color_manual(
      values = colors, 
      name = "Significance",
      labels = c(
        "Significant Concordant ↑HeH" = "Significant Concordant ↑HeH",
        "Significant Discordant" = "Significant Discordant",
        "Significant Concordant ↑ETV6::RUNX1" = expression("Significant Concordant ↑"*italic("ETV6::RUNX1")),
        "Non-significant (RNA or MS)" = "Non-significant (RNA or MS)"
      )
    ) +
    scale_shape_manual(
      values = shapes,
      breaks = names(shapes),
      name = "Category",
      drop = FALSE
    ) +
    
    # Fixed axis limits
    coord_fixed(xlim = x_lim, ylim = y_lim) +
    
    # Quadrant labels with italic ETV6::RUNX1
    annotate("text", x = x_lim[2] * 0.95, y = y_lim[2] * 0.95, 
             label = "Concordant\n(↑HeH)", 
             hjust = 1, vjust = 1, size = 3.5, color = "gray20", fontface = "bold") +
    annotate("text", x = x_lim[1] * 0.95, y = y_lim[2] * 0.95, 
             label = "Discordant\n(X↓, Y↑)", 
             hjust = 0, vjust = 1, size = 3.5, color = "gray20", fontface = "bold") +
    annotate("richtext", x = x_lim[1] * 0.95, y = y_lim[1] * 0.95, 
             label = "**Concordant**<br>(**↑***ETV6::RUNX1*)", 
             hjust = 0, vjust = 0, size = 3.5, color = "gray20", fontface = "bold",
             fill = NA, label.color = NA) +
    annotate("text", x = x_lim[2] * 0.95, y = y_lim[1] * 0.95, 
             label = "Discordant\n(X↑, Y↓)", 
             hjust = 1, vjust = 0, size = 3.5, color = "gray20", fontface = "bold") +
    
    # Labels
    labs(
      x = x_label,
      y = y_label,
      title = paste("")
    ) +
    
    # Theme
    theme_minimal(base_size = 11) +
    theme(
      plot.title = element_text(size = 13, hjust = 0.5, face = "bold"),
      plot.caption = element_text(size = 9, color = "gray50"),
      axis.title = element_text(size = 11, face = "bold"),
      axis.text = element_text(size = 10),
      legend.title = element_text(size = 10, face = "bold"),
      legend.text = element_text(size = 9),
      legend.position = "right",
      panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
      panel.grid.major = element_line(color = "gray90", linewidth = 0.5),
      panel.border = element_rect(color = "gray30", fill = NA, linewidth = 0.8),
      plot.margin = margin(10, 10, 10, 10),
      aspect.ratio = 1
    )
  
  # Print correlation statistics to console
  cat("\n", title_suffix, "Correlation Statistics:\n")
  cat("Pearson's r =", cor_r, "\n")
  cat("P-value =", cor_p, "\n")
  cat("Sample size =", nrow(plot_data), "\n")
  cat("95% CI: [", round(cor_test$conf.int[1], 3), ", ", round(cor_test$conf.int[2], 3), "]\n\n")
  
  return(p)
}

# Calculate global limits
all_categories <- df[[category_col]]
all_categories <- all_categories[!is.na(all_categories)]
all_categories <- sort(unique(as.character(all_categories)))

# Fixed shape mapping (consistent across all plots)
shape_pool <- c(16, 17, 15, 18, 8, 3, 4, 7, 9, 10, 11, 12, 13, 14)
global_shapes <- shape_pool[seq_along(all_categories)]
names(global_shapes) <- all_categories

all_values <- c(
  df[[rna_fc_col]], df[[olink_fc_col]], 
  df[[massspec_fc_col]], df[[olink_fc_col]]
)
all_values <- all_values[!is.na(all_values)]
max_abs_value <- max(abs(all_values))
global_limits <- list(
  x = c(-max_abs_value, max_abs_value),
  y = c(-max_abs_value, max_abs_value)
)

# Create plots
plot1 <- create_quadrant_plot(
  data = df,
  x_col = rna_fc_col,
  y_col = olink_fc_col,
  x_pval_col = rna_pval_col,
  y_pval_col = olink_pval_col,
  title_suffix = "Olink vs RNA",
  x_label = "mRNA Expression Log2FC",
  y_label = "Protein Abundance Log2FC (Olink)",
  fixed_limits = global_limits,
  shape_values = global_shapes
)

plot2 <- create_quadrant_plot(
  data = df,
  x_col = massspec_fc_col,
  y_col = olink_fc_col,
  x_pval_col = massspec_pval_col,
  y_pval_col = olink_pval_col,
  title_suffix = "Olink vs Mass-spec",
  x_label = "Mass-spec Log2FC",
  y_label = "Protein Abundance Log2FC (Olink)",
  fixed_limits = global_limits,
  shape_values = global_shapes
)

# Save individual plots
#ggsave("../figures/quadrant_plot_olink_vs_rna.png", plot1, 
#       width = 8, height = 8, dpi = 300, bg = "white")
#ggsave("../figures/quadrant_plot_olink_vs_massspec.png", plot2, 
#       width = 8, height = 8, dpi = 300, bg = "white")

# Combine plots
combined_plot <- plot1 + plot2 + 
  plot_layout(ncol = 2, guides = "collect") +
  plot_annotation(
    title = expression(bold("Comparison of Protein Expression Methods in HeH vs "*italic("ETV6::RUNX1")*" BCP-ALL")),
    theme = theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 16, hjust = 0.5))
  )

print(combined_plot)

# Natural scale plots
plot1_natural <- create_quadrant_plot(
  data = df,
  x_col = rna_fc_col,
  y_col = olink_fc_col,
  x_pval_col = rna_pval_col,
  y_pval_col = olink_pval_col,
  title_suffix = "Olink vs RNA",
  x_label = "mRNA Expression Log2FC",
  y_label = "Protein Abundance Log2FC (Olink)",
  fixed_limits = NULL,
  shape_values = global_shapes
)

plot2_natural <- create_quadrant_plot(
  data = df,
  x_col = massspec_fc_col,
  y_col = olink_fc_col,
  x_pval_col = massspec_pval_col,
  y_pval_col = olink_pval_col,
  title_suffix = "Olink vs Mass-spec",
  x_label = "Mass-spec Log2FC",
  y_label = "Protein Abundance Log2FC (Olink)",
  fixed_limits = NULL,
  shape_values = global_shapes
)

print(plot1_natural)
print(plot2_natural)

#ggsave("../figures/quadrant_plot_olink_vs_rna_natural.png", plot1_natural, 
#       width = 8, height = 8, dpi = 300, bg = "white")
#ggsave("../figures/quadrant_plot_olink_vs_massspec_natural.png", plot2_natural, 
#       width = 8, height = 8, dpi = 300, bg = "white")

combined_plot_natural <- plot1_natural + plot2_natural + 
  plot_layout(ncol = 2, guides = "collect") +
  plot_annotation(
    title = expression(bold("Comparison of Protein Expression Methods in HeH vs "*italic("ETV6::RUNX1")*" BCP-ALL")),
    theme = theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 16, hjust = 0.5))
  )

ggsave("../figures/quadrant_plots_combined_natural.png", combined_plot_natural, 
       width = 14, height = 7, dpi = 300, bg = "white")
#ggsave("../figures/quadrant_plots_combined_natural.pdf", combined_plot_natural, 
#       width = 14, height = 7, dpi = 300, bg = "white")
```
